data.name: 香草布蕾與玫瑰怪盜
data.detailed_description:
◆故事


數年前的雨夜，失去記憶的紅兒被酒館老闆茉莉收留。
雖然沒有關於以前的回憶，但在茉莉的陪伴下，他覺得這也無所謂。
現在的生活很快樂，就算沒有那些過去，他也能作為茉莉的養子平靜生活下去。
──直到那個名為波文的男人闖入他的生活前，紅兒是真心這麼想的。
波文的糾纏、逐漸習慣的自己、以及一次因發情期鑄成的錯誤而意外被揭開的秘密，一切的一切都與自己的過去有著千絲萬縷的關聯。

「你到底是誰？而我，又是誰？」

一連串的謎團接踵而來。王都的神祕怪盜、下町區的情報販子、見不得光的貴族罪刑──
『──唉，實在太讓人傷心了。到底要怎麼樣，你才願意相信我呢？』
『──等你哪天願意為我赴死吧。』
『──噢，這當然沒問題，親愛的。哪天你如果遇到危機，我會為你拚上性命。』

◆玩法


閱讀文字劇情後，透過選項，決定Omega──紅兒的行動，不同的選項將會導向不同的結局。
是否能解開紅兒的過去，走向完好的結局，選擇全在於你。

◆特色系統


無壓力操作設計-快速文字跳轉系統在環境設定裏能打開全CG模式，自由瀏覽HCG

◆遊戲特色


◇12張CG，2場H劇情
◇遊戲文字約5.5萬字
◇兩位主要男角，一位女性配角，一位男性配角
◇感情向，關於過去、約定以及承諾的故事
◇遊戲結局：9種結局，包含1種True End

data.short_description: 雖然作為男性Omega在酒館內擔任舞孃，但賣藝不賣身向來是我的準則。 已經數不清有多少人因為試圖騷擾我，而被我摔出酒館了。這些人通常不是惱羞後再也不上門，不然就是自知理虧摸摸鼻子算了。 然而，我還是第一次遇到，被我過肩摔後，非但不惱羞，也不自重，反而整個人纏上我的類型。 ……難道這個人其實有被虐狂嗎？ 這個無賴的Alpha──波文，接近我到底有什麼目的？
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 泰文, 簡體中文

最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間

  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Vanilla Brulee & The Rose Bandit
data.detailed_description:
◆ Story


On a rainy night a few years ago, Molly, the owner of a bar, took in Hong'er, who had lost his memory.
Although he had no memories of the past, he thought that it didn't matter because he had Molly's company.
Life was happy now; even without the past, he could live a quiet life as Molly's adopted son.
--That was what Hong'er really thought until the man named Bowen came into his life.
His entanglement with Bowen, his growing acceptance of him, and the accidental revelation revealed by a mistake made in heat, everything was tied together to his past.

"Who are you? And who am I?"

A series of mysteries ensued. A mysterious bandit in the royal capital, an informer in the lower town, a nobleman's crime that could not be seen--
"--Ah, it's so sad. What will it take for you to believe me?"
"--Until you're willing to die for me."
"--Oh, that's all right, dear. If you are in danger one day, I will die for you.”

◆ Gameplay Instructions


When reading the story, you can determine the actions of the Omega, Hong'er, through various choices that will lead to different outcomes.
It is up to you to decide whether you can unravel Red's past and reach the true ending.

◆Game Features


◇ 12 CGs, 2 sex plots
◇ Game text 55,000
◇ Two main male characters, one male side character and one female side character
◇ Game endings: 9 types, including one True Ending

data.short_description: As an Omega male, although I worked in a bar as a dancer, it was my number one rule not to sell my body. However, for the first time, I met someone who, instead of being angry or starting to show me respect, still clang to me after I'd thrown him over my shoulder. Was this person actually a masochist?
data.supported_languages: Traditional Chinese, English, Thai, Simplified Chinese

  • DirectX: Version 9.0
